snippet.title: Singapore CNY tragedy: Five die after car slams into shophouse, fire breaks out
snippet.description:
Five people died and one was injured after a BMW slammed into the front of a shophouse before bursting into flames at Tanjong Pagar Road in Singapore Saturday (Feb 13) morning.
 
Preliminary investigations revealed the car was driven by a 29-year-old man with four male passengers, in their 20s.

Read more at https://bit.ly/3tTInF8

WATCH MORE: https://thestartv.com/c/news
SUBSCRIBE: https://cutt.ly/TheStar
LIKE: https://fb.com/TheStarOnline

#ŠŁÄňşÉŠčĺ#Liziqi#l├Żtß╗şthß║ą#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood

Tomorrow is Chinese New YearÔÇÖs Eve! 
We put up lanterns, paste Spring Festival couplets, and do shopping and stock up for the new year!
Another year is dawning!
Chinese New YearÔÇÖs decorations, goods and snacks are ready for the big day.

snippet.title: 'IÔÇÖm not a cat': lawyer gets stuck on Zoom kitten filter during court case
snippet.description:
A lawyer showed up to virtual court in the 394th district of Texas with a kitten filter turned on, the cat moving its lips and eyes, as Rod Ponton said he and his assistant were attempting to remove the filter during the court case.

The judge later posted the snipped and wrote: 'If a child used your computer before you join a virtual hearing, check the Zoom video options to be sure filters are off. This kitten just made a formal announcement on a case in the 394th.'

snippet.title: Can You Be Single And Happy? | Real Talk Season 2 Episode 16
snippet.description:
For most people, finding their life-long partner is the ultimate goal but does that mean that we can't be happy if haven't found ours?

Valentine's Day is coming but instead of talking about love, love, love, the cast discusses about their single lives and their thoughts about being ready for a relationship.

Like many other events during a pandemic, this year's New Year Gala also featured virtual performances, combining art and high tech. Chinese pop star Andy Lau performed virtually, joining Guan Xiaotong and Wang Yibo in a creative show titled "Ox Strut" to wish audiences a happy and healthy Chinese New Year.

id.title: Tahun Baru Imlek akan tiba lagi, aku membuat ÔÇťHidangan SapiÔÇŁ menyambut Tahun Baru Imlek!
id.description:
ÔÇ╗Tekan tombol pada menu di kanan bawah, maka akan muncul subtitle dengan bahasa yang sesuai!

Selamat Tahun Baru kepada semuanya. Lagi-lagi setahun dilewati. Setelah makan kenyang hidangan di malam Tahun Baru Imlek, maka sudah terhitung memasuki tahun yang baru! Terima kasih kalian dalam setahun ini selalu menemani dan mendukungku. Di tahun yang baru ini, semoga yang beruntung adalah kamu, yang berbahagia adalah kamu, yang sehat adalah kamu, yang menjadi kaya adalah kamu, semoga yang selalu menamaniku di kemudian hari juga kamu.

Halo semuanya. Aku adalah Dianxi Xiaoge, seorang gadis khas Yunnan. Jika kalian menyukai videoku, silakan terus ikuti saluranku ini. Aku akan berbagi kehidupanku dan makanan lezat khas Yunnan di platform yang berbeda. Semoga kalian setiap hari berbahagia, dan setiap hari selalu ditemani makanan lezat~

en.title: Prepared many dishes for reunion dinner. Celebrate the new year with some "ox-themed" dishes!
en.description:
ÔÇ╗Click "cc" on the lower right menu to choose your subtitle language.

Happy Spring Festival, everyone! Another year is about to begin. After this reunion dinner, we will officially enter the new year. Thanks for your love and support in the past year. Hopefully in this new year, good luck, happiness, health and fortune stays with you and I will also be there for you.

Hello, everyone! I am Dianxi Xiaoge, a Yunnan native. If you enjoy my videos, please keep subscribing to my channel.
I'll continue to share my life and Yunnan-sytled food in my uploads. Wish you have a happy life and enjoy tasty food every day.

snippet.title: MAN UNITED 3-3 EVERTON | PREMIER LEAGUE HIGHLIGHTS
snippet.description:
Dominic Calvert-Lewin rescued a late point for Everton at Old Trafford to make it seven away games without defeat. Carlo Ancelotti's side found themselves 2-0 down at half-time via goals from Edinson Cavani and Bruno Fernandes, but Abdoulaye Doucour├ę and James Rodriguez struck after the break. Scott McTominay thought he'd won it for Manchester United, until Calvert-Lewin steered home his 13th Premier League goal of the season in the 95th minute.

snippet.description:
Benjamin PavardÔÇÖs second-half goal proved the difference as UEFA Champions League winners Bayern Munich won the FIFA Club World Cup Qatar 2020 after a victory against MexicoÔÇÖs Tigres UANL. FC BayernÔÇÖs world title triumph makes it a clean sweep of six trophies for the German giants, emulating the achievement of Barcelona in 2009/10.

snippet.description:
Goals en highlights van Leicester City FC - Liverpool FC gespeeld in de Premier League op 13/02/2021. Bekijk alle doelpunten en hoogtepunten in de samenvatting van deze Engelse competitiewedstrijd. ÔçĘ Abonneer je nu op het YouTube kanaal van Ziggo Sport voor meer video's ÔçĘ http://bit.ly/2Q03IYg

Landskampioen Liverpool dat met maar liefst 18 punten voorsprong kampioen is geworden is the one to beat dit seizoen! Na dertig jaar wist Liverpool eindelijk weer de titel te pakken. Kunnen zij de titel ook dit jaar binnen halen? Of wordt het toch Manchester City, Manchester United of Chelsea met o.a. Hakim Ziyech? En hoe vergaat het Donny van der Beek bij zijn nieuwe club Manchester United?

De Premier League is dit seizoen spannender dan ooit! Volg het ook dit jaar weer allemaal live bij Ziggo Sport op kanaal 14!

snippet.title: G League Ignite vs. Santa Cruz Warriors - Condensed Game
snippet.description:
The NBA G League is the NBA's official minor league. Fans can get a glimpse at the players, coaches and officials competing to ascend to the NBA's rank. With 40 percent of players on start-of-season NBA rosters boasting NBA G League experience when the 2018-19 season tipped off in October, the NBA G League YouTube Channel is the best place to see the future now.

The NBA G League consists of 27 teams for the 2018-19 season, all singly affiliated with an NBA franchise: Agua Caliente Clippers of Ontario (Los Angeles Clippers), Austin Spurs (San Antonio Spurs), Canton Charge (Cleveland Cavaliers), Capital City Go-Go (Washington Wizards), Delaware Blue Coats (Philadelphia 76ers), Erie BayHawks (Atlanta Hawks), Fort Wayne Mad Ants (Indiana Pacers), Grand Rapids Drive (Detroit Pistons), Greensboro Swarm (Charlotte Hornets), Iowa Wolves (Minnesota Timberwolves), Lakeland Magic (Orlando Magic), Long Island Nets (Brooklyn Nets), Maine Red Claws (Boston Celtics), Memphis Hustle (Memphis Grizzlies) Northern Arizona Suns (Phoenix Suns), Oklahoma City Blue (Oklahoma City Thunder), Raptors 905 (Toronto Raptors), Rio Grande Valley Vipers (Houston Rockets), Salt Lake City Stars (Utah Jazz), Santa Cruz Warriors (Golden State Warriors), Sioux Falls Skyforce (Miami Heat), South Bay Lakers (Los Angeles Lakers), Stockton Kings (Sacramento Kings), Texas Legends (Dallas Mavericks), Westchester Knicks (New York Knicks) and Wisconsin Herd (Milwaukee Bucks).

Visit us on the web: http://www.NBAGLeague.com
Like us on Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/nbagleague
Follow us on Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/nbagleague
Follow us on Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/nbagleague

snippet.title: Mission Valentine | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Trading App at https://bit.ly/Chanchlani_OctaFX and get 5000 USD in your demo account ­čĺÁ. Start making extra money with the "Best Forex Broker in India 2020" - OctaFX­čĆć­čôł

Aa gaya humara naya video
MISSION VALENTINE!
PURA VIDEO END TAK DEKHNA
Warna maza nai aaega
Bahut time baad tum sab seth logo ke lie ek one story video banayi
Haan maalum hai tum sabko laga 3rd part aaega valentine ka 
Lekin dekha humne kaise usko tease kiya video mein­čśë
Acha sachi bolta hu is video ke peeche 1 mahina lag gaya,from scripting to editing islie itna delay ho gaya video
Maafi seth log.
But maza aa gaya
Ye descrption main aaj subah ke 6 baje hagte hue likh raha hu socho kitni fatt gayi­čśé
Wo sab chodho ye humara pehla video hai jisme humne first time ek naye aspect ko introduce kiya aur normalize kiya
(Lekin DOKHA paap hai saalo yaad rakhna)
Abhi suno kasam se kehta hu is baar puri ki puri editing maine ki
Is baar video mein puri ki puri ACV team hai
Except Anmol
Except Grishim
Except Muski
Okay lol..
Is video mein kaafi naye chehre bhi dekhne mile honge jinhone bahut amazing performance diya
Introducing ACV team mein Bhavika Motwani as kaam-waali didi
Super talented Vivek Menon (@Watermenon Pictures ) apne beyounick ki team se (teesra hawaldar after kunal & tushar­čśé)
Aur to aur wo hotel waali ladki jo bhaag gayi Ritika bajaj
Baaki sab purane chawal hai ACV team ke likhte likhte thak jaunga
@Akash Dodeja as mc dost
@Kunal Chhabhria  as lavaris baap
@Simran Dhanwani meri valentine 
Manvita Chhabhria (kunal ki real life biwi aur meri reel life mummy)
@Rohit Sadhwani  as harami manager
@Ritesh Sadhwani  wo paneer-dudh waala 
@Tanish Sirwani  wo dank hotel guest
@Jashan Sirwani  wo hotel waala jo mam ke saath aaya tha
Akash jagtap wo acha desh ka nagrik jo buzurko ki madad karta hai (dont judge a book by its cover)
@Paras Rupani  as bhagoda boyfriend
Animesh Makhija wo nanga dodta hua guest (bhai ki body achi thi toh nanga scene kiya apne liye­čÖî­čĆ╗)
Karan dhanwani rota hua aashiq (dhyaan se dekhna)
Camera @Siddharth Kedare  urf cinderella ne sambhala (shoot khatam hote hi bhaag jaata hai saala)
Lights aur production sirwani brothers ( mere mama ke ladke, aaj kal 50 r lete hai din ka)
Sound handling by ritesh wohi dudh waala
Ladka acha hai but jokes gande maarta hai
Wo hotel couple of wala scene ka idea was idea by Ashi chawla (idea ache deta hai par shooting se darta hai)
Baaki script writing & direction by your chanchuÔŁĄ´ŞĆ
Seth log agar ye video pasand aayi toh please
Like chodh ke jaana
Mast comment karna favorite scene aur video apne committed (if they exist) as well as single ( matlab sab log­čśé)
ke saath share karna
Baaki toh tum seth log ko  maalum hai tumhara ashu tum acvians se kitna pyaar karta hai­čśś
#AshishChanchlani #MissionValentine #Acvians

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong ÔÇô Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
┬á
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, ÔÇťGodzilla vs. Kong,ÔÇŁ the next epic adventure in LegendaryÔÇÖs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in ÔÇťGodzilla vs. KongÔÇŁ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansÔÇöinstigated by unseen forcesÔÇöis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg├ąrd (ÔÇťBig Little Lies,ÔÇŁ ÔÇťThe Little Drummer GirlÔÇŁ), Millie Bobby Brown (ÔÇťStranger ThingsÔÇŁ), Rebecca Hall (ÔÇťChristine,ÔÇŁ ÔÇťProfessor Marston and the Wonder WomenÔÇŁ), Brian Tyree Henry (ÔÇťJoker,ÔÇŁ ÔÇťSpider-Man: Into the Spider-VerseÔÇŁ), Shun Oguri (ÔÇťWeathering with YouÔÇŁ), Eiza Gonz├ílez (ÔÇťFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & ShawÔÇŁ), Julian Dennison (ÔÇťDeadpool 2ÔÇŁ), with Kyle Chandler (ÔÇťGodzilla: King of the MonstersÔÇŁ) and Demi├ín Bichir (ÔÇťThe Nun,ÔÇŁ ÔÇťThe Hateful EightÔÇŁ).
Wingard (ÔÇťThe Guest,ÔÇŁ ÔÇťYouÔÇÖre NextÔÇŁ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (ÔÇťThor: RagnarokÔÇŁ) and Max Borenstein (ÔÇťGodzilla: King of the Monsters,ÔÇŁ ÔÇťKong: Skull IslandÔÇŁ), story by Terry Rossio (ÔÇťPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No TalesÔÇŁ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (ÔÇťGodzilla: King of the MonstersÔÇŁ), based on the character ÔÇťGodzillaÔÇŁ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorÔÇÖs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (ÔÇťThe Mummy,ÔÇŁ ÔÇťWorld War ZÔÇŁ), production designers Owen Paterson (ÔÇťJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,ÔÇŁ ÔÇťGodzillaÔÇŁ) and Thomas S. Hammock (ÔÇťBlair WitchÔÇŁ), editor Josh Schaeffer (ÔÇťGodzilla: King of the MonstersÔÇŁ), costume designer Ann Foley (ÔÇťSkyscraperÔÇŁ) and visual effects supervisor John ÔÇťDJÔÇŁ DesJardin (upcoming ÔÇťZack SnyderÔÇÖs Justice LeagueÔÇŁ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, ÔÇťGodzilla vs. Kong.ÔÇŁ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: Trump releases statement on his acquittal
snippet.description:
Former President Trump released a brief statement saying "this has been another phase of the greatest witch hunt in history." #FoxNews

Subscribe to Fox News! https://bit.ly/2vBUvAS
Watch more Fox News Video: http://video.foxnews.com
Watch Fox News Channel Live: http://www.foxnewsgo.com/

FOX News Channel (FNC) is a 24-hour all-encompassing news service delivering breaking news as well as political and business news. The number one network in cable, FNC has been the most-watched television news channel for 18 consecutive years. According to a 2020 Brand Keys Consumer Loyalty Engagement Index report, FOX News is the top brand in the country for morning and evening news coverage. A 2019 Suffolk University poll named FOX News as the most trusted source for television news or commentary, while a 2019 Brand Keys Emotion Engagement Analysis survey found that FOX News was the most trusted cable news brand. A 2017 Gallup/Knight Foundation survey also found that among Americans who could name an objective news source, FOX News was the top-cited outlet. Owned by FOX Corporation, FNC is available in nearly 90 million homes and dominates the cable news landscape, routinely notching the top ten programs in the genre.

snippet.title: Douluo Continent (Dunia Douluo) | ŠľŚšŻŚňĄžÚÖć | EP01 | Xiao Zhan, Wu Xuan Yi | WeTVŃÇÉINDO SUBŃÇĹ
snippet.description:
Yuk tonton full episodenya, GRATIS melalui apps WeTV disini http://bit.ly/3oM1ptz !

Ditinggal ibunya saat masih kecil, Tang San tumbuh dengan bergantung pada ayahnya. Begitu juga sang ayah bergantung padanya. Cermat dan dewasa untuk bocah seusianya plus bakat dan luar biasa yang ia miliki, ia dikirim ke Rouding Academy di umur 6 tahun demi mengejar cita-cita menjadi seorang roh petarung. Di sana, di bawah pengawasan Yu Xiao Gang, ia berkawan dengan seorang bocah yatim bernama Gu Xiao Wu. Bersama mereka menjalani jatuh bangun demi menjadi murid terbaik. Seiring waktu mereka kian dekat, bersumpah untuk saling menjaga satu sama lain dan jadi saudara angkat seumur hidup. Saat kekuatan dan kepandaian mereka kian bertambah, Gu Xiao Wu sadar kalau ia membutuhkan lebih banyak bimbingan dari guru lain. Maka, ia dan Tang San dikirim ke Shrek Academy. Di sana, mereka bergabung bersama lima murid berbakat lain dari berbagai perguruan. Berbekal kekuatan masing-masing ketujuh murid lalu dikenal di seantero daratan sebagai "Tujuh Iblis Shrek". Kala mereka kian tersohor, tujuh murid itu menarik perhatian para tetua dan mengundang mereka melanjutkan pendidikan di Akademi Kerajaan Tian Dou. Namun, tak lama usai menerima undangan mereka mendapati diri terperangkap dalam intrik istana antara pangeran pertama dan pangeran ke-empat. Di waktu yang sama, Tang San menyingkap rahasia yang lama tersembunyi menyangkut kematian ibunya. Saat menghadapi berbagai konflik di setiap segi, Tang San terpaksa bertarung. Tidak hanya untuk melindungi orang yang ia sayangi, namun juga demi membela harkat kelompoknya, menyelamatkan bangsanya, serta menggenapi upayanya untuk menjadi roh petarung terhebat sepanjang masa.
Douluo Continent (Dunia Douluo) | ŠľŚšŻŚňĄžÚÖć | EP01 | Xiao Zhan, Wu Xuan Yi | WeTVŃÇÉINDO SUBŃÇĹ

Tidak hanya untuk melindungi orang yang ia sayangi, namun juga demi membela harkat kelompoknya, menyelamatkan bangsanya, serta menggenapi upayanya untuk menjadi roh petarung terhebat sepanjang masa.

snippet.title: IndonesiaÔÇÖs ÔÇśsilver peopleÔÇÖ strive to make a living
snippet.description:
Subscribe to our YouTube channel for free here: 
https://sc.mp/subscribe-youtube

In IndonesiaÔÇÖs West Java province, Puryanti has been struggling to make a living. Finding it difficult to get work, the single mother, along with her son and nephew, have been wearing silver paint and bowing to people on the busy streets of Jakarta for an occasional coin. On a good day, Puryanti earns just 50,000-70,000 rupiah (US$3.58-US$5.00).

snippet.title: If We Acted Like Our Parents During CNY
snippet.description:
How you like some of your own medicine! Sike, my parents don't even give me medicine, just ask me drink water.... HAPPY CNY EVERYONE, HOPE EVERYONE HUAT HUAT, but make sure y'all staying safe still~! 

Written by:
Thomas the danK engineeee @HeyThomasK
Beautiful awesome fantastic baoss lady Lingyi Xiong @Blingyi  

Filmed and Edited by:
Jason Hau now brown cow @jasonkokotan

Produced by:
isit Jeanette? Yeap! it is @Jeanettoes
The very LOOOOONG YI Xuan @Yeetato

Starring the people who have it easy:
Thomas K @HeyThomasK

Lingyi Xiong @Blingyi
Long Yi Xuan @Yeetato 
Jason Hau @Jasonkokotan
Chrysan Lee @ChrysanLee
Lev Panfilov @LevPanfilov
Kelly Wong @Kellykanez

snippet.title: Our Last Episode After 3 Years! | Food King Singapore
snippet.description:
Happy Lunar New Year! Today we go on a noodle hunt to find some of the best and unique noodle dishes that the hawkers have to offer!

Also, weÔÇÖll be going on a monthÔÇÖs break!!!! Catch us at our upcoming YouTube live streams where weÔÇÖll be bringing you on a hawker food tour of your choice. Stay connected with us via our Telegram group (https://t.me/foodkingnoc) and various social platforms!

1. Yummy Noodle House 1:10
Sembawang Hills Food Centre, #01-08, 590 Upper Thomson Rd, Singapore 574419
Opening hours: 8.30am - 8.30pm daily except Mondays

Dishes:
Shabu Shabu Laksa - $7.50
Curry Meatball Noodle - $5.30
Cheese Fried Dumplings - $4.60

Dishes:

snippet.title: KSI Tries Nigerian And British Snacks | Snack Wars | LADbible
snippet.description:
KSI is back in the LADbible studio to play a game of Snack Wars. In this episode @JJ Olatunji compares British and Nigerian snacks - which will he prefer? Safe to say he did not enjoy the Nigerian Palm Wine. 

@Anne-Marie  x @KSI x Digitalfarmanimals new single, DonÔÇÖt Play, is out now.


Subscribe To Our Channel: http://bit.ly/SubscribeLADbible
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ladbible/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ladbible/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/ladbible

#LADbible #UNILAD

snippet.title: Week after coup, protests continue in Naypyitaw
snippet.description:
(8 Feb 2021) Myanmar police fired water cannon into a protesting crowd in the capital Naypyitaw, on Monday, but video shot shortly before the incident appears to show no obvious cause.
The demonstrators seemed to do little more than chant pro-democracy slogans, display signs condemning last week's coup and make three-fingered salutes, a sign of dissent adopted from protesters in neighbouring Thailand. 
There was a large police presence ÔÇô rows of personnel with shields and some with rifles ÔÇô but though it was noisy the protest did not appear to offer any threat.
The protests in Naypyitaw, ongoing for several days, have been especially unusual, for a great part of the city's population are civil servants and their families. 
The city was purpose-built under a previous military government, has a heavy military presence and lacks the tradition of protest of the former capital, Yangon.

snippet.description:
ItÔÇÖs been a year since we last did an assumption video and today, IÔÇÖm adding a little twist by reacting to the craziest rumors youÔÇÖve heard about me over the years. Enjoy! ­čśë

LOVE MARIE ONGPAUCO-ESCUDERO (known in the Philippine entertainment industry as Heart Evangelista) started her career at the age of 13 as a commercial model and actress. Her 20 years of hard work paved the way to numerous acting and hosting projects and awards. Through the years, she has evolved from being a professional actor and television host to a sought-after international and local brand endorser, sold-out visual artist, best-selling author, fashion influencer, beauty icon, and entrepreneur. She is one of the countryÔÇÖs most recognized celebrities, and advocates for childrenÔÇÖs health and education, individuals with special needs, and animal welfare. She wishes to share these passions with the world through this platform.

snippet.title: Biden's Lunar New Year greetings
snippet.description:
For  more:
https://newsus.cgtn.com/news/2021-02-13/Biden-s-Lunar-New-Year-greetings-XQ08J64jBu/index.html

U.S. President Biden and First Lady Jill Biden wish Asian Americans and Pacific Islanders a happy, healthy and prosperous Lunar New Year. They said "racism, harassment, hate crimes" against this group of people is "simply wrong" and called for unity in the country.

snippet.title: WANDAVISION Episode 6 Breakdown & Ending Explained Spoiler Review | Marvel Easter Eggs & Theories
snippet.description:
WANDAVISION Episode 6 Breakdown & Ending Explained Spoiler Review | Marvel Easter Eggs & Theories. We review, recap and explain the sixth episode of Wandavision on Disney Plus. This contains easter eggs, theories, spoilers and a breakdown of the events and behind the scenes leaks on the Marvel property. We also discuss where the Evan Peter's Quicksilver role could be going as well as Monica and of course The Hex!

#Wandavision #EasterEggs #EndingExplained #Quicksilver #EvanPeters #Marvel #MCU #Wanda #Vision #Episode6 #Episode7 #CaptainAmerica #IronMan #Disney #Pietro #Ultron #Darcy

If you enjoyed this video then please subscribe to the channel https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq3hT5JPPKy87JGbDls_5BQ?sub_confirmation=1

If You Want To Help Support The Channel So I Can Make More Videos Like This Please Donate Here:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq3hT5JPPKy87JGbDls_5BQ/join

Get some awesome Heavy Spoilers show clothes, phonecases and accessories at - https://teespring.com/en-GB/stores/deffinitions-store

*Check out our BEST new videos below*
*TENET Side Characters Explained* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XCEJFCDvkhc&feature=youtu.be
*The Stand Ending Explained* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GbtGRTa5tsM&feature=youtu.be
*Wandavision Episode 5 Breakdown* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AMP5yJgED3o
*Fight Club Easter Eggs* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LmMQzjJ8a5g&feature=youtu.be
*Godzilla Vs Kong Trailer Breakdown* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oftPMViKDSU&feature=youtu.be


/* ----- SOCIAL MEDIA ----- */

Follow Me On Social Media At:
https://www.facebook.com/DeffinitionMC/
https://twitter.com/heavyspoilers
https://www.instagram.com/heavyspoilers/


/* ----- DISCORD ----- */

Join our Discord Community at - https://discord.gg/dDMJN4a


/* ----- VIDEO INFORMATION ----- */

0:00 Wandavision Episode 6 Intro 
0:43 Hayward Villain Theory
2:36 Billy And Tommy Theory
3:02 90s Sitcom Influences
4:02 Comic Book Influences
4:54 Wandavision Episode 6 Breakdown
21:15 Wandavision Episode 6 Review
22:23 Wandavision Magneto Leaks?

Both Billy and Tommy have appeared in the same colours as their comic book counterparts and throughout the episode we see their powers manifest likely setting up them as their full versions Wiccan and Speed by the end. It does highlight that this was the plan originally and also paints out why Wanda has been so confused.

Everytime she or Vision have been close to uncovering the truth, something has distracted them and Episode 5's neck breaking moment came in the form of Quicksilver played by Evan Peters.

The episode pulls heavily from Malcolm in the middle due to not only it's intro but also the way that it's shot and the monologues that the characters deliver to the camera. We also have quick cuts to other elements that the characters are referencing. The soundtrack beats are also extremely similar as well as the way that the characters act, namely Evan Peters who is very much a stand in for the older brother from the show.

This show primarily followed a family as they struggled with all the highs and lows of raising children in Middle America. Unlike the sitcoms of the 50s and 60s shows the 80s saw and big turn in the genre and by the 90s it was more common to showcase that marriage wasn't all sunshine and rainbows. Though the editing and style of the shows were a bigger focus they painted out families in a far more realistic setting which I feel this episode does too to some extent.

Vision attempting to leave the Hex could be seen as a metaphor for a divorce or seperation and though that's probably a reach it paints out his and Wanda's marriage in a far more complicated manner that simply can't be magically fixed.

Speaking of those costumes they are also very akin to what the actual characters wore in the comics making for some fun nods towards the source material. I absolutely loved quicksilvers but I think that Wanda and Vision's look the best...sorry guys.

Shoutouts Simon Arne Burman and @AlexSerna1508

Ada satu hal yang tidak biasa di panggung spekta Top 10 Indonesian Idol malam ini. Tiba - tiba Judges meminta Boy William untuk menyanyikan satu lagu, dan Boy William memilih untuk menyanyikan lagunya Lesti Kejora Loh!!  Kenapa ya Boy milih untuk menyanyikan lagunya Lesti Kejora ??

Dari pada penasaran langsung aja nonton videonya!!!

snippet.title: Film Theory: How WandaVision Will End And Why It Matters (Marvel)
snippet.description:
Subscribe to never miss a Film Theory! Ôľ║ http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH      

I am thoroughly impressed with Disney's first Marvel Disney+ show, WandaVision. The old time sitcom comedy mixed with the almost Twilight Zone feel of the mystery is just what I needed to reinvigorate the Marvel Theory side of my brain. Today Loyal Theorists, I am going to PREDICT the end of WandaVision based on all of the cluse so far - plus how I think it will shape the rest of the MCU moving forward. You won't want to miss this!

snippet.title: Uppena Telugu Movie Trailer | Panja Vaisshnav Tej | Krithi Shetty | Vijay Sethupathi | Buchi Babu
snippet.description:
Uppena Telugu Movie Trailer on Mythri Movie Makers. #Uppena Latest 2021 Telugu Movie ft. Panja Vaisshnav Tej, Vijay Sethupathi and Krithi Shetty. Written & Directed by Buchi Babu Sana. Music by DSP / Devi Sri Prasad. Presented by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers & Sukumar Writings banners.

Uppena Trailer is officially released by Young Tiger NTR.

The tale of an incredible love, Uppena movie is all set for a Grand Release in theaters on February 12th, 2021.

snippet.title: What $20 Buys You at a Japanese STREET FOOD Market
snippet.description:
Japanese street food is a dream. But how far does a $20 budget go at a morning market? It's time to find out as we wander through the street market accompanied by Japan's most questionable chef.

snippet.title: Kapuso Mo, Jessica Soho: RESULTA NG DNA TEST NG SANGGOL NA NAPALITAN DAW SA ISANG OSPITAL SA RIZAL
snippet.description:
Aired (February 7, 2021): Nitong nakaraang Linggo, itinampok natin ang kaso ng mag-asawang Aphril at Marvin na napagpalit diumano ang kanilang bagong silang na sanggol. Nag-iba raw kasi ang hitsura at ang name tag nito! Si Aphril at ang inuwi nilang sanggol, sumailalim sa DNA test.

Ang resulta ng kanilang DNA test, panoorin sa video!

snippet.title: Michael Cohen: Does Donald Trump have a 'secret' pardon? | 60 Minutes Australia
snippet.description:
Subscribe here: http://9Soci.al/chmP50wA97J Full Episodes: https://9now.app.link/uNP4qBkmN6 | Power of Attorney (2021)

He may no longer be President, but Donald Trump canÔÇÖt stop making headlines. In the next few days he goes on trial in the US Senate charged with inciting his supportersÔÇÖ rampage on the Capitol building last month. But while the world was shocked by the shameful attack on democracy, TrumpÔÇÖs former attorney, Michael Cohen, wasnÔÇÖt surprised at all. In fact two years ago he predicted it. Cohen used to be The DonaldÔÇÖs closest ally but ended up an enemy, and in prison, when he took the fall for covering up TrumpÔÇÖs affair with porn star Stormy Daniels. And now, in an extraordinary interview with Tara Brown, filmed while he serves the remainder of his sentence under house arrest in New York, Cohen is happy to spill all of his old bossÔÇÖs dirty secrets.

WATCH more of 60 Minutes Australia: https://www.60minutes.com.au 
LIKE 60 Minutes Australia on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/60Minutes9 
FOLLOW 60 Minutes Australia on Twitter: https://twitter.com/60Mins

Reporters Liz Hayes, Tom Steinfort, Tara Brown, Liam Bartlett and Sarah Abo look past the headlines because there is always a bigger picture. Sundays are for 60 Minutes.
